test.name: TC-001 Login réussi avec un utilisateur standard

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${_safe} = TC-001 Login réussi avec un utilisateur standard
kw.arg: ''.join('_' if c in r'<>:"/\|?*()' else c for c in """${TEST NAME}""")
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.doc: Vérifier que l'utilisateur peut se connecter avec succès en utilisant les identifiants standard.

test.name: TC-002 Login échoué avec identifiants invalides

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${_safe} = TC-002 Login échoué avec identifiants invalides
kw.arg: ''.join('_' if c in r'<>:"/\|?*()' else c for c in """${TEST NAME}""")
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Text 'Products' did not appear in 8 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'Products' did not appear in 8 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath://*[contains(normalize-space(),'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.doc: Vérifier que l'application affiche un message d'erreur lorsque les identifiants sont invalides.

test.name: TC-003 Login bloqué pour l'utilisateur locked_out_user

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${_safe} = TC-003 Login bloqué pour l'utilisateur locked_out_user
kw.arg: ''.join('_' if c in r'<>:"/\|?*()' else c for c in """${TEST NAME}""")
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Text 'Products' did not appear in 8 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'Products' did not appear in 8 seconds.

kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath://*[contains(normalize-space(),'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.doc: Vérifier que l'application affiche un message d'erreur lorsque l'utilisateur est bloqué.

test.name: TC-004 Logout depuis le menu latéral

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${_safe} = TC-004 Logout depuis le menu latéral

test.doc: Vérifier que l'utilisateur peut se déconnecter en utilisant le menu latéral.

test.name: TC-005 Affichage de la liste complète des produits (Read)

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${_safe} = TC-005 Affichage de la liste complète des produits _Read_
kw.arg: ''.join('_' if c in r'<>:"/\|?*()' else c for c in """${TEST NAME}""")
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.doc: Vérifier que la page affiche la liste complète des produits.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC-011 Tentative de checkout avec champ prénom vide (Erreur formulaire)

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.msg: ${_safe} = TC-011 Tentative de checkout avec champ prénom vide _Erreur formulaire_
kw.arg: ''.join('_' if c in r'<>:"/\|?*()' else c for c in """${TEST NAME}""")
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Window Size
kw.doc: Sets current windows size to given ``width`` and ``height``.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
